title: hieracium lachenalii subsp. chlorophyllum
intro: Hieracium lachenalii subsp. chlorophyllum, also known as Yellow Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Yellow Hawkweed include reducing fever, relieving rheumatic and arthritic pain, and treating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Yellow Hawkweed include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or externally to harness its medicinal properties.
